blinkblade.text: Replace one -1 card with one +1 card
Replace one -1 card with one +0 Wound card
Replace one +0 card with one +1 Immobilize card
Replace one +0 card with one +0 rolling card: on your next attack, discard it to add +2 (persistent)
Replace two +1 cards with two +2 cards
Add one -1 card that grants 1 time token
Add one +2 rolling card with self Regenerate
When you short rest, you may spend one unused spent item (for no effect) to recover a different spent item
At the start of your first turn each scenario, you may perform Move 3
